source_pr.title: planner: show accessed partition when explain mpp query over partition table
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #30365

Problem Summary:
As the issue described.
### What is changed and how it works?
The root cause is when convert mpp task into root task, it does not set the `PartitionInfo` in `PhysicalTableReader`.
A simple fix is to set `PartitionInfo` when convert mpp task into root task, however, since mpp task may contain `join/union/union all`, it is possible that a physical table reader contains more than 1 table scan, and just one `PartitionInfo` is not enough in this case. This pr adds `PartitionInfos` in `PhysicalTableReader`, and for mpp task, it will collect all the `PartitionInfo`s into `PhysicalTableReader.PartitionInfos`, when explain query, it will show all the access objects derived from `PhysicalTableReader.PartitionInfos`
### Check List

- [x] Integration test

Side effects

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
show accessed partition when explain mpp query over partition table
```
